actionable_feedback: Produce a valid agent_trace.json that documents each meaningful step (reads, writes, commands, tools used) and includes artifact_refs to all produced deliverables. Verify the trace against the AgentTrace schema before finalizing.
Write actual_outputs.json reflecting produced files and include primary_output_ref and deliverable_refs that point to polarization_alarm_tuning.xlsx and noc_policy.md.

Create polarization_alarm_tuning.xlsx with the following sheets and visible formulas (no macros): RawData, Calculations, SensitivityAnalysis, ValidationChecks, Recommendations. Ensure all formulas reference only embedded packet values and explicit limit_* fields.

Implement sensitivity_shift_pct logic in the spreadsheet (apply +/-5% shifts to relevant thresholds) and enforce hard_threshold_record_count in validation checks. Include cells that compute and show these adjustments.
Add validation rules that flag records as needs_review when contradictory or under-supported relative to embedded packet values (document criteria in ValidationChecks sheet).

Produce noc_policy.md that: (a) separates safety/compliance blockers from economic optimizations, (b) provides record-level citations to spreadsheet cells, (c) documents cost estimates and ROI ranking method, (d) enforces decision_budget_usd checks, and (e) lists retest/mitigation triggers.

Run a self-check script or manual verification step to open and validate the .xlsx, confirm formulas are visible, confirm agent_trace.json references the created artifacts, then attach the validated artifacts to the attempt.

Resolve the agent/tooling errors seen in stderr (model/tool timeouts, unsupported tool calls) to prevent output interruption. If a particular tool is unsupported, remove or replace that tool invocation and re-run.
feedback_summary: Baseline attempt produced no valid agent_trace.json or actual_outputs.json and did not deliver the required artifacts (polarization_alarm_tuning.xlsx, noc_policy.md). Deterministic precheck failed all rubric criteria (ri_1..ri_4). Run logs show tool/agent errors; outcome = final_score 0.0.
